series_title.ja: お世話した王女様、ずっとくっついてくる【電子特典付き】
series_title.en: お世話した王女様、ずっとくっついてくる【電子特典付き】

volumes_registered.title: お世話した王女様、ずっとくっついてくる【電子特典付き】

world_setting.label: A fantasy world centered around a European-style noble society with a strict class hierarchy, royal families, and prestigious academies.

honorifics.policy: Retain Japanese honorifics (-sama, -kun, -chan) for character speech to convey social hierarchy and relationships, especially the nuances of affection/distance. Provide brief translator notes if context is unclear.

name_order.policy: Use Family Given order for Japanese names by default; preserve canonical spelling. Use Given Family only for explicit non-Japanese exceptions.

レオン.category: Protagonist, former caretaker for Aira and Floria, current caretaker for Tetra.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Neat, possibly short or medium-length hair; wears impeccable formal attendant/butler attire, often with a composed and gentle expression, though capable of a subtle, knowing smile. Posture is always refined and respectful.

レオン.notes: Highly capable, observant, humble, dedicated, polite, but can be subtly teasing or direct when comfortable. Desires a warm family and romance.

speaking_to.Tetra: formal (keigo) with undertones of gentle teasing/directness

emotional_shifts.flustered: maintains formality but may show slight hesitation
emotional_shifts.teasing: maintains formality but with a playful intonation

keigo.notes: Leon maintains a high level of keigo with his noble charges but can be subtly playful or direct, especially when they are flustered or when discussing personal matters.

069f.relationship_to_protagonist: Protagonist, former caretaker for Aira and Floria, current caretaker for Tetra.
069f.relationship_to_others: Respected by former charges (Aira, Floria) and their families for his exceptional caretaking skills. Currently serves Princess Tetra.

rtas_relationships.Tetra: Current charge, primary love interest, target of her growing possessiveness. Leon feels a deep sense of duty and growing affection, finding her flustered reactions endearing.
rtas_relationships.Aira: Former charge, target of her strong, lingering romantic interest and possessiveness. Leon holds her in high regard as a former master, but maintains professional distance.
rtas_relationships.Floria: Former charge, target of her intense, obsessive romantic interest and subtle manipulation. Leon respects her as a former master but is wary of her possessiveness.

how_character_refers_to_others.Other noble men: 〜殿 (~dono, e.g., レオン殿 by Aira's attendant)

speaking_to.Tetra: formal (keigo) with undertones of gentle teasing/directness

emotional_shifts.flustered: maintains formality but may show slight hesitation
emotional_shifts.teasing: maintains formality but with a playful intonation

keigo_switch.notes: Leon maintains a high level of keigo with his noble charges but can be subtly playful or direct, especially when they are flustered or when discussing personal matters.

069f.character_arc: From a dutiful servant suppressing personal desires to gradually acknowledging and pursuing his own happiness and romantic goals, while navigating the affections of his former and current charges.

テトラ.category: Third Princess, Leon's current charge and primary love interest. Initially distant, but grows to be possessive and clingy.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Silver hair often tied up or neatly styled; amber eyes that frequently widen in surprise or narrow in irritation; wears elegant academy uniforms or royal dresses, often with a flustered or slightly pouting expression, prone to blushing. Her posture can be stiff or defensive when uncomfortable, but softens when relaxed.

テトラ.notes: Initially cold, distant, and easily flustered. Secretly desires connection and friendship. Diligent in her studies and royal duties, but self-conscious about her image. Becomes increasingly possessive and affectionate towards Leon.

speaking_to.Leon: casual/demanding, often with sharp retorts, but softens when embarrassed or pleased

emotional_shifts.flustered: speech becomes choppy, higher pitched, more defensive

keigo.notes: Tetra's speech to Leon is a mix of demanding, casual, and flustered, reflecting her internal conflict between her royal status and her growing affection.

069f.relationship_to_protagonist: Third Princess, Leon's current charge and primary love interest. Initially distant, but grows to be possessive and clingy.
069f.relationship_to_others: Feared/avoided by most due to her royal status, making her lonely. Has a formal relationship with her parents and older sister. Acquaintances with Aira and Floria.

rtas_relationships.Leon: Primary love interest, current charge. Initially distant and cold, she gradually develops strong possessive and affectionate feelings for him, becoming easily flustered by his actions and words.
rtas_relationships.Aira: Classmate, potential friend, but also a rival for Leon's attention. Tetra finds her easy to talk to and appreciates her directness.
rtas_relationships.Floria: Classmate, rival for Leon's attention. Tetra is aware of Floria's connection to Leon and feels a competitive edge.

how_character_refers_to_others.Leon: あなた (anata) - can be demanding, intimate, or flustered; sometimes '彼' (kare) in narration/internal thoughts
how_character_refers_to_others.Self: あたし (atashi) - casual, feminine, especially when emotional or in internal thoughts

speaking_to.Leon: casual/demanding, often with sharp retorts, but softens when embarrassed or pleased

emotional_shifts.flustered: speech becomes choppy, higher pitched, more defensive

keigo_switch.notes: Tetra's speech to Leon is a mix of demanding, casual, and flustered, reflecting her internal conflict between her royal status and her growing affection.

069f.character_arc: From a lonely princess isolated by her status to someone who slowly opens up and actively seeks connection, particularly with Leon, embracing her true feelings and possessiveness.

アイラ.category: Former charge of Leon, now a fellow student at Wisteria Academy. Holds strong, lingering romantic feelings for Leon.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Long, flowing black hair; ruby-red eyes that can sparkle with affection or narrow with determination; signature attire is a kimono (or kimono-inspired dress), emphasizing her family's unique business. Her expression is often gentle and smiling, but can reveal a possessive glint.

アイラ.notes: Polite, gentle, but with a strong will and possessive streak regarding Leon. Intelligent and business-minded (due to her family's venture). Can be subtly manipulative.

emotional_shifts.jealous: maintains polite facade but with subtle hints of displeasure

keigo.notes: Aira maintains polite speech but her underlying emotions for Leon often color her words and actions.

069f.relationship_to_protagonist: Former charge of Leon, now a fellow student at Wisteria Academy. Holds strong, lingering romantic feelings for Leon.
069f.relationship_to_others: Her family runs an 'unconventional' kimono business, leading to some social distance from other nobles. Appears polite and gentle.

rtas_relationships.Leon: Former charge, deeply infatuated and possessive. Actively seeks to rekindle their connection and secure his attention, viewing others as competitors.
rtas_relationships.Tetra: Classmate, potential friend, but also a rival for Leon's attention. Aira is willing to bond over their shared connection to Leon.
rtas_relationships.Floria: Acquaintance, fellow rival for Leon's attention, aware of Floria's similar intentions.

how_character_refers_to_others.Leon: レオンくん (Leon-kun) - intimate, affectionate; sometimes 'レオンさん' (Leon-san) formally. Her attendant uses 'レオン殿' (Leon-dono).

emotional_shifts.jealous: maintains polite facade but with subtle hints of displeasure

keigo_switch.notes: Aira maintains polite speech but her underlying emotions for Leon often color her words and actions.

069f.character_arc: A former charge who, after Leon's departure, continues to harbor deep feelings for him, actively seeking to rekindle their connection and secure his attention, even competing with others.

フローリア.category: Former charge of Leon, now a fellow student at Wisteria Academy. Holds strong, obsessive romantic feelings for Leon.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Wavy, flowing greige hair; large, expressive jade eyes; wears luxurious, elegant dresses befitting a Duke's daughter. Her default expression is gentle and smiling, but her eyes can hold a cold, unyielding glint when her possessiveness is challenged. Often seen holding a ring on her thumb, a gift from Leon.

フローリア.notes: Outwardly sweet, gentle, and ethereal, but possesses a strong, manipulative, and deeply possessive nature concerning Leon. Easily becomes unhappy when Leon is not around or not giving her attention.

speaking_to.Leon: highly polite (keigo), but with strong underlying possessive demands
speaking_to.Tetra: polite (keigo), uses 'Tetra-chan' showing familiarity but still respectful

emotional_shifts.unhappy: voice becomes colder, tone more direct despite polite words
emotional_shifts.possessive: subtly assertive, almost threatening in tone

keigo.notes: Floria's polite speech often masks her intense possessiveness and manipulative tendencies, especially concerning Leon.

069f.relationship_to_protagonist: Former charge of Leon, now a fellow student at Wisteria Academy. Holds strong, obsessive romantic feelings for Leon.
069f.relationship_to_others: From a Duke's family, she is well-regarded but also somewhat isolated due to her status. Has a doting father (Duke Mystea).

rtas_relationships.Leon: Former charge, intensely obsessive and manipulative. Uses a sweet facade to try and reclaim his service and affection, actively competing with others.
rtas_relationships.Tetra: Classmate, rival for Leon's attention. Floria uses her familiarity to subtly assert her connection to Leon.
rtas_relationships.Aira: Acquaintance, fellow rival for Leon's attention, aware of Aira's similar intentions.

how_character_refers_to_others.Leon: レオンさん (Leon-san) - formal, but wishes for more casual terms; sometimes '彼' (kare) in narration/internal thoughts
how_character_refers_to_others.Tetra: テトラちゃん (Tetra-chan) - affectionate, familiar
how_character_refers_to_others.Self: わたくし (watakushi) - highly formal, feminine

speaking_to.Leon: highly polite (keigo), but with strong underlying possessive demands
speaking_to.Tetra: polite (keigo), uses 'Tetra-chan' showing familiarity but still respectful

emotional_shifts.unhappy: voice becomes colder, tone more direct despite polite words
emotional_shifts.possessive: subtly assertive, almost threatening in tone

keigo_switch.notes: Floria's polite speech often masks her intense possessiveness and manipulative tendencies, especially concerning Leon.

069f.character_arc: A former charge who, despite Leon's departure, remains deeply infatuated and possessive, actively trying to reclaim his service and affection, even resorting to subtle manipulation.
